get.description: Returns all events-to-metrics rules for the team.

schema.title: E2M
schema.description: This data structure represents an Event to Metrics (E2M) object.

createTime.description: RFC3339 timestamp of when this E2M was created.

dataSource.description: Optional data source in namespace/dataset_name format. If not set, defaults to the standard logs/spans stream.

description.example: avg and max the latency of catalog service

id.description: Unique identifier for this E2M. Required on update requests.

isInternal.description: Indicates whether this E2M is for internal use only.

metricFields.description: Metric fields to extract and aggregate from the events.

metricLabels.description: Metric labels to attach to the generated metrics.

updateTime.description: RFC3339 timestamp of when this E2M was last updated.

schema.title: E2M Create Params
schema.description: This data structure is used to create a new event to metric definition

dataSource.description: Optional data source in namespace/dataset_name format. If not set, defaults to the standard logs/spans stream.

description.example: avg and max the latency of catalog service
description.description: Human-readable description for the new E2M.

metricFields.description: Metric fields to create and aggregate from the events.

metricLabels.description: Metric labels to attach to the generated metrics.

name.description: Human-readable name for the new E2M.

permutationsLimit.description: Maximum number of unique metric permutations allowed for this E2M.

post.description: Atomically executes a batch of events-to-metrics rules.

schema.description: Request containing an atomic list of events-to-metrics actions to execute.

get.description: Returns the details of the specified events-to-metrics rule.

delete.description: Deletes the events-to-metrics rule with the specified ID.

get.description: Returns cardinality information for events-to-metrics labels.

parameters.name: spans_query
parameters.description: Spans-based query used to evaluate label cardinality.

schema.title: SpansQuery
schema.description: This data structure represents a query for spans.

parameters.name: logs_query
parameters.description: Logs-based query used to evaluate label cardinality.

schema.title: SpansQuery
schema.description: This data structure represents a query for logs.

parameters.name: metric_labels
parameters.description: The metric labels to evaluate cardinality for.

schema.description: The metric labels to evaluate cardinality for.

items.title: Metric Label
items.description: This data structure represents a metric label

get.description: Returns the events-to-metrics quota limits for the team.

AtomicBatchExecuteE2MResponse.description: Response returned after atomically executing a batch of events-to-metrics rules.

CreateE2MRequest.title: Create E2M Request
CreateE2MRequest.description: This is used to create a new event to metric definition

DeleteE2MRequest.title: Delete E2M Request
DeleteE2MRequest.description: This data structure is used to delete an existing event to metric definition

DeleteE2MResponse.title: Delete E2M Request
DeleteE2MResponse.description: This data structure is obtained when deleting an existing event to metric definition

E2M.title: E2M
E2M.description: This data structure represents an Event to Metrics (E2M) object.

createTime.description: RFC3339 timestamp of when this E2M was created.

dataSource.description: Optional data source in namespace/dataset_name format. If not set, defaults to the standard logs/spans stream.

description.example: avg and max the latency of catalog service

id.description: Unique identifier for this E2M. Required on update requests.

isInternal.description: Indicates whether this E2M is for internal use only.

metricFields.description: Metric fields to extract and aggregate from the events.

metricLabels.description: Metric labels to attach to the generated metrics.

updateTime.description: RFC3339 timestamp of when this E2M was last updated.

E2MAggHistogram.title: E2M Aggregate Histogram
E2MAggHistogram.description: This data structure represents the e2m aggregate histogram

E2MAggSamples.title: E2M Aggregate Samples
E2MAggSamples.description: This data structure represents the e2m aggregate samples

E2MCreateParams.title: E2M Create Params
E2MCreateParams.description: This data structure is used to create a new event to metric definition

dataSource.description: Optional data source in namespace/dataset_name format. If not set, defaults to the standard logs/spans stream.

description.example: avg and max the latency of catalog service
description.description: Human-readable description for the new E2M.

metricFields.description: Metric fields to create and aggregate from the events.

metricLabels.description: Metric labels to attach to the generated metrics.

name.description: Human-readable name for the new E2M.

permutationsLimit.description: Maximum number of unique metric permutations allowed for this E2M.

E2MPermutations.title: E2M Permutations
E2MPermutations.description: This data structure represents the limit of events2metrics permutations and if the limit was exceeded

FilterPathAndValues.title: FilterPathAndValues
FilterPathAndValues.description: This data structure represents a filter path and values

Filters.title: Filters
Filters.description: This data structure represents a filter

GetE2MResponse.title: Get E2M Response
GetE2MResponse.description: This data structure is obtained when retrieving an existing event to metric definition

GetLimitsResponse.description: Response containing the events-to-metrics quota limits.

ListE2MResponse.title: List E2M Response
ListE2MResponse.description: This is the response obtained when listing all event to metric definitions

ListLabelsCardinalityResponse.description: Response containing label cardinality data for events-to-metrics rules.

MetricLabel.title: Metric Label
MetricLabel.description: This data structure represents a metric label

ReplaceE2MRequest.title: Replace E2M Request
ReplaceE2MRequest.description: This data structure is used to replace an existing event to metric definition

ReplaceE2MResponse.title: Replace E2M Response
ReplaceE2MResponse.description: This data structure is obtained when replacing an existing event to metric definition

v2.Aggregation.title: Aggregation
v2.Aggregation.description: This data structure represents an aggregation

none.description: Marker indicating no additional metadata is needed for this aggregation type.

targetMetricName.description: Name of the target metric produced by this aggregation.

v2.LogsQuery.title: SpansQuery
v2.LogsQuery.description: This data structure represents a query for logs.

v2.MetricField.title: Metric Field
v2.MetricField.description: This data structure represents a metric field

v2.SpansQuery.title: SpansQuery
v2.SpansQuery.description: This data structure represents a query for spans.
